title: 03{a,b,c,d,e,f}-gaps-*.json — per-type gap analysis
description: Source of truth for each 03x-gaps-*.md. One file per gap-type agent (A=API, B=DB, C=Outbound, D=Money, E=Security, F=Fintech cross-cutting). Each contains: test structure tree, contract map table, gap list, and optional test stubs narrative.

scope.description: Which slice of the contract this file analyzes. Drives rendered section titles.

gap_prefix.description: Identifier prefix for all gaps in this file. Grader B13 enforces that every gap id starts with this prefix.

scope_note_md.description: Short preamble (the 'Scope: ...' line under the title). Optional.

test_tree.description: Nested per-field test scenarios with ✓/✗ status.

root.description: Tree root label, typically the unit id.

description.description: Scenario text including expected outcome, e.g. 'nil → 422, no DB write, no data leak'.

test_ref.description: Pointer to the existing test that covers this scenario (when covered=true).

partial_note.description: If covered=true but only partially (e.g., status-only), note what's missing.

contract_map.description: Rendered as a markdown table: field | role | scenarios needed | current coverage | gap count.

field_kind.description: Left-most column in the rendered map, e.g. 'request field', 'response field', 'db field (input)'.

gap_count.description: Number of gap scenarios, possibly with PARTIAL upgrade note.

description.description: Prose gap explanation — what's missing, why it matters, what could regress.

stub.description: Test stub source code. Required for CRITICAL gaps (grader B4).

test_stubs_md.description: Optional narrative intro + fenced code block(s) for test stubs. Per-gap `stub` fields can also be aggregated into this section by the renderer.
